# cp_layer_renderer_configuration_set_color_format

**Function**

Sets the pixel format for the layer’s color textures to the specified value.

## Declaration

```swift
void cp_layer_renderer_configuration_set_color_format(cp_layer_renderer_configuration_t configuration, MTLPixelFormat color_format);
```

## Parameters

- **configuration**: The layer configuration details.
- **color_format**: The pixel format to apply to your layer’s color textures. The value you specify must be one of the values obtained from the [doc://com.apple.compositorservices/documentation/CompositorServices/cp_layer_renderer_capabilities_supported_color_format] function.

## Discussion

Use this function to modify the configuration details for your layer. Fetch the layer’s supported pixel formats using the [doc://com.apple.compositorservices/documentation/CompositorServices/cp_layer_renderer_capabilities_supported_color_format] function.



## Configuring the color textures

- **cp_layer_renderer_configuration_get_color_format**: Returns the pixel format to use for the layer’s color textures.
- **cp_layer_renderer_configuration_get_color_usage**: Returns the texture usage value to apply to the layer’s color textures.
- **cp_layer_renderer_configuration_set_color_usage**: Sets the texture usage for the layer’s color textures to the specified value.
